posts.text: Strike hits Jerusalem’s Old City nbcnews.com/nightly-news/vid… via @nbcnews

Wars are impossible to control. Today the war with Iran nearly took a very serious turn when part of missile exploded near some of the holiest sites on earth.

Video

In the Old City of Jerusalem - the closest of calls. How the war with Iran almost became a global religious war - today

Video

Netanyahu said after this war with Iran ends, middle east oil could flow through Israel. This would have enormous economic and political implications for the region and the world.

Video

Netanyahu spoke to a few reporters.  He insists Israel is not dragging the world to war, and explained how he envisions reshaping the middle east so that oil pipelines flow through Israel.  (And despite rumors, he was really there and alive)

Video
War between Afghanistan and Pakistan has much wider consequences.  By @saadmohseni. He knows this subject inside and out.   ft.com/content/f0980a32-dfd9… via @ft
